name: phpdftk/raster
description: Pure-PHP software raster compositor for phpdftk — renders graphics primitive trees to RGBA pixel buffers, applies CSS Filter Effects 1 + Compositing 1/2 + advanced Masking 1 operations, then exports as a PDF Image XObject. Required substrate for CSS filter, backdrop-filter, mix-blend-mode beyond PDF-native modes, mask-composite, and CSS Transforms 3 (3D).
